issues.description: Missing condition: effect is optional ('You may'), requires Optional condition

FlipLife and GiveDon are sequential with dependency: FlipLife is a cost (optional choice to flip 1), GiveDon is the effect (add up to 1 DON). Current structure treats both as independent actions. Should clarify cost vs effect or use conditional logic
GiveDon description mentions 'set it as active' but action type only covers adding DON; activation state may be implicit

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-down: Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
